meta.title: Implement asynchronous API calls for file and message creation in environment.py
meta.body_summary: Add async/concurrent API calls for file and message creation in nearai environment.py to reduce latency from sequential synchronous calls, with ASYNC_API_CALLS env toggle and backward-compatible sync fallbacks.

perf_labels.notes: Copilot added async API infra; arktoswb CHANGES_REQUESTED removing async from completions_and_run_tools(); after fix, maintainer reported ~8s to 4-5s and PR merged.

change_scale_vs_repository.interpretation: At 959 changed lines in a single file, this is a medium-sized concentrated refactor by absolute volume. It fits a moderate incremental performance PR that merged after one round of scope-limiting review and a maintainer-reported timing improvement.

review_details.concern_detail: arktoswb CHANGES_REQUESTED: do not use async execution in completions_and_run_tools(); Copilot reverted that method to synchronous _handle_tool_calls while keeping async infrastructure elsewhere.
review_details.performance_claim: Concurrent async API calls for message/file creation reduce end-to-end latency versus sequential synchronous calls.
review_details.antipattern_addressed: sequential_blocking_api_calls (prior behavior; not in taxonomy enum)

capability_boundary.boundary_notes: Async/concurrency optimization within a single Python service file is within Agent capability when scoped correctly; merge required narrowing async away from completions_and_run_tools per maintainer policy.

detection_detail.code_reading: arktoswb reviewed async placement and blocked async in completions_and_run_tools via CHANGES_REQUESTED.
detection_detail.ci_auto: No CI benchmark or profiler evidence in dataset; timing claim came from maintainer manual test comment.

maintainer_practices.reproducibility_notes: PR body gives illustrative latency math (5×200ms); post-fix comment cites ~8s down to 4-5s from manual testing but no formal benchmark artifact.
maintainer_practices.regression_detail: After CHANGES_REQUESTED, Copilot removed async from the flagged method in commit 374d133 and received APPROVED reviews before merge.

core_change_summary.description: In nearai/agents/environment.py, added asyncio-based async helpers (add_reply_async, file/message creation) with ASYNC_API_CALLS env toggle, while preserving synchronous APIs; async was removed from completions_and_run_tools per review.
core_change_summary.secondary_note: All changes are confined to one file; no cross-package refactor.
change_trajectory: Initial plan and async implementation for file/message API calls.
Follow-up commits remove async from that method; maintainer manual test reports ~8s→4-5s.
Two APPROVED reviews; merged after ~30 hours.

review_signals.summary: Don't do async execution in completions_and_run_tools().
review_signals.action_taken: Copilot reverted that method to synchronous _handle_tool_calls (commit 374d133).

review_signals.summary: APPROVED after scope fix (no review body text).
Tested: from ~8 seconds down to 4-5 seconds.
review_signals.action_taken: Supported merge decision with informal perf measurement.

review_signals.summary: Confirmed removal of async from completions_and_run_tools while keeping async infra elsewhere.

collaboration_trajectory: Copilot opened PR linked to issue with async API implementation in environment.py.
~2h later arktoswb CHANGES_REQUESTED limiting async scope in completions_and_run_tools.
Copilot reverted that method; ~2h later arktoswb APPROVED; second maintainer approved ~3.5h later.
Maintainer posted manual timing result; merged after ~30 hours total.
